common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.youtube_quota_exhausted: YouTube has reached its daily limit. Try again when it resets (every day).

playlists.title: My playlists
playlists.intro: Check several to merge them into one, or open one to clean duplicates and sort with AI. If you changed your playlists on YouTube, hit Refresh.
playlists.not_connected: Sign in with Google (button on the top right) to see your playlists.
playlists.archive_sources_warning: ⚠ The other playlists will be archived locally (not deleted from YouTube). They stay visible only in this app, marked as archived.
playlists.merge_helper: The largest playlist is chosen because it needs fewer changes. You'll see a preview of what gets added before anything is uploaded to YouTube. Only songs that aren't already there are added.
playlists.merge_busy_desc: Adding the new songs to the playlist, one by one. Don't close this page.
playlists.merge_paused: ⚠ Stopped because YouTube hit its daily limit. Merge again when it resets to finish.
playlists.preview_summary: {{add}} new songs will be added · {{present}} were already in the playlist.
playlists.preview_nothing: They're all already in the target playlist. 🎉 You can still merge: the source playlists get queued to be deleted from YouTube, leaving only the target.
playlists.preview_quota: Applied locally now; uploading to YouTube will cost ~{{quota}} units.
playlists.merge_staged: ✓ Done locally: {{n}} songs are now pending upload to YouTube (see the notice above).
playlists.merge_apply_desc: Saving locally. Nothing is uploaded to YouTube yet.
playlists.pending_banner: You have {{changes}} change(s) not uploaded to YouTube.
playlists.pending_intro: These merges are already applied locally (you see them when you open each playlist). Upload them to YouTube whenever you want, or discard them.
playlists.pending_discard_confirm: Discard this change? The local merge will be undone (the songs won't be added).
playlists.upload_paused: ⚠ Stopped at YouTube's daily limit. {{remaining}} songs and {{sources}} playlists still pending — it stays queued. Tomorrow, when the quota resets, hit Upload and it continues where it left off (already-uploaded items aren't re-sent).
playlists.upload_confirm:
You're about to UPLOAD {{songs}} songs to YouTube and then DELETE from your account: {{sources}}.

This is permanent and can't be undone. Continue?
playlists.pending_will_delete: On upload these get deleted from YouTube: {{sources}}
playlists.archive_sources_confirm: You're about to merge everything into "{{target}}" and then ARCHIVE the other playlists. The songs stay on YouTube, but this app will mark them as archived. Continue?
playlists.error_load: Could not load your playlists. Are you signed in with Google?
playlists.refresh_all_confirm_body: This will read {{playlists}} playlist(s) from YouTube and spend ~{{quota}} unit(s) of your daily quota. Continue?
playlists.refresh_all_done: Done: {{playlists}} playlist(s) and {{items}} songs refreshed. ~{{quota}} quota unit(s) used.
playlists.refresh_all_partial: ⚠ {{skipped}} playlist(s) could not be read (quota exhausted or private). Updated what was possible.
playlists.refresh_all_error: Could not refresh. Are you signed in with Google?

detail.busy_desc: Processing on YouTube. Don't close the page.
detail.confirm_remove: Remove the duplicates? One copy of each song will be kept.

cross.title: Organize songs
cross.intro: Move and assign your songs across playlists. Pick a mode: see duplicates, browse a whole list, or search a song. Changes apply locally and stay pending upload to YouTube.
cross.empty_list: This list isn't loaded. Use "Refresh all" in My playlists to fetch it.
cross.bulk_remove_confirm: Remove {{n}} songs from "{{list}}"? It stays pending (YouTube untouched until you upload).
cross.assign_help: Check the playlists where the song should be. It's added to new ones and removed from unchecked ones.
cross.failed_warning: ⚠ {{failed}} lists could not be read (YouTube limit reached or private). The result may be incomplete.
cross.empty: No duplicate songs across your lists. 🎉
cross.busy_desc: Reading the songs in each list. Don't close this page.
cross.error_scan: Could not review. Are you connected with Google?
cross.pending_title: {{count}} song change(s) not uploaded to YouTube
cross.move_paused: Stopped at the daily limit; {{rem}} left. Hit Upload again when it resets.
cross.assign_upload_confirm: This will apply on YouTube: add and/or remove this song from the chosen playlists. Continue?
cross.assign_discard_confirm: Discard this change? It reverts locally (YouTube untouched).
cross.upload_all_confirm: You're about to upload ALL {{n}} reassignments to YouTube (add/remove). This is permanent. Continue?
cross.discard_all_confirm: Discard all {{n}} pending reassignments? They revert locally.

search.title: Search Songs
search.placeholder_name: e.g.: Never Gonna Give You Up
search.intro: Enter a Video ID or song name to start

cache.title: Cache Explorer
cache.archived_empty: No archived playlists yet. When you merge playlists and check "archive the others", they'll show up here.
cache.review_empty: You haven't applied any merges yet. Once you do, they'll be recorded here.
cache.review_archived_badge: The other playlists were archived locally
